areas.name: Biometrics
use_cases: Remote biometric identification of natural persons (including post-remote)
Biometric categorisation inferring sensitive attributes (race, political opinions, trade union membership, religious/philosophical beliefs, sex life/sexual orientation)
Emotion recognition systems

areas.name: Critical infrastructure
use_cases: AI safety components in management and operation of critical digital infrastructure
AI safety components in road traffic management
AI safety components in supply of water, gas, heating, electricity

areas.name: Education and vocational training
use_cases: Determining access or admission to educational and vocational training institutions
Evaluating learning outcomes that affect the educational future of a person
Assessing appropriate level of education for an individual (profiling)
Monitoring and detecting prohibited behaviour of students during tests

areas.name: Employment, workers management, and access to self-employment
use_cases: Recruitment or selection of natural persons (targeted job ads, screening, filtering, evaluation during interviews)
Decisions affecting terms of work-related relationships, promotion, or termination
Task allocation, monitoring or evaluation of performance and behaviour of persons in work-related relationships

areas.name: Essential private and public services
use_cases: AI systems used by public authorities or on their behalf to evaluate eligibility for essential public services or benefits
AI systems used to evaluate creditworthiness or establish credit score of natural persons (except fraud detection)
AI systems used for risk assessment and pricing in life and health insurance
AI systems to dispatch or prioritise emergency services (police, fire, medical aid)
AI systems making decisions on eligibility for health and life insurance

areas.name: Law enforcement
use_cases: Individual risk assessment of natural persons to assess risk of offending or reoffending or risk of becoming a victim
Use as polygraphs or similar tools to detect emotional state
Evaluation of reliability and accuracy of evidence in criminal proceedings
Profiling of natural persons in the course of detection, investigation, or prosecution of criminal offences
Crime analytics to profile natural persons or assess personality traits likely to offend

areas.name: Migration, asylum, and border control management
use_cases: Polygraphs or similar tools used on natural persons in migration, asylum, and border control
Risk assessment of natural persons for immigration purposes (irregular migration risk, security risk, health risk)
Examination of visa and asylum applications and associated complaints
Detection, recognition, or identification of natural persons in the context of migration, asylum, and border control

areas.name: Administration of justice and democratic processes
use_cases: AI assistance to judicial authorities in researching and interpreting facts and the law, and applying it to a specific set of facts
AI used to influence elections and referenda or voting behaviour of natural persons
AI used to influence targeted natural persons in political campaigns
